emails.subject: Address for Mary
emails.body: Address for Mary Give me your new address please!!!! Thanks. Also, I am giving myself a small dinner birthday party Saturday night (Hollis, the Hammons, Barbara and Ed) and would like you to come to if you can. Let me know. Mary Cordially, Mary Cook Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith, 38th Floor, Legal Houston, Texas 77002-7361 (713) 345-7732 (phone) (713) 646-3490 (fax) mary.cook@enron.com
